body_txt: Note that simply suspending someone by the head would be unlikely to break their neck, assuming that you did it gently. However, rarely will anyone ask why the hat doesn't just fly off without its wearer. Compare Helicopter Hair and Hair Wings . See also Mercury's Wings (wings on the head or feet), and Propeller Hat of Whimsy (a propeller hat indicating a whimsical wearer that may or may not grant the ability to fly). Subtrope of Hat of Power .
